channel.title: Follow Builders — X/Twitter
channel.description: AI builders' latest tweets, curated by follow-builders

item.title: Peter Yang (@petergyang): Visiting Shanghai / Hangzhou for 2 weeks in early April. Was born there but haven’t been back in ove...
item.description:
Visiting Shanghai / Hangzhou for 2 weeks in early April. Was born there but haven’t been back in over a decade.
Any good tech scenes to check out? https://t.co/M2g6LqY3nS
Bio: I share extremely practical AI tutorials and interviews | Join 140K+ readers at https://t.co/XYKTmGVH14 | Product at Roblox ❤️ 46 🔁 0

item.title: Nan Yu (@thenanyu): It is indeed crazy! considering how many more startups have been funded, the fact that survival rate...
item.description:
It is indeed crazy! considering how many more startups have been funded, the fact that survival rates didn’t drop off a cliff is remarkable https://t.co/AfnvelfNs6 https://t.co/8c73SqFYa7
Bio: head of product @linear ❤️ 9 🔁 0

item.title:
Matt Turck (@mattturck): LinkedIn launched in 2003
YouTube launched in 2005
Twitter/X launched in 2006
(Facebook 2004, I...
item.description:
LinkedIn launched in 2003
YouTube launched in 2005
Twitter/X launched in 2006
(Facebook 2004, Insta 2010, Snap 2011 etc)
Network effects create massive long term staying power.
Unclear yet if the AI era can build its own strong flywheels (data loops etc) https://t.co/4BZbL2eFWY
Bio: VC at @FirstMarkCap. Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape. ❤️ 27 🔁 3

item.title: Zara Zhang (@zarazhangrui): We need to touch grass and read books
item.description:
We need to touch grass and read books
Bio: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w Substack: https://t.co/dDPEWGiuBW ❤️ 17 🔁 1

item.title:
Zara Zhang (@zarazhangrui): Almost every AI power user I know is MORE stressed and busier after using AI, not less
What people ...
item.description:
Almost every AI power user I know is MORE stressed and busier after using AI, not less
What people thought AI would do: 10x productivity so that we can finish work earlier & relax more
What it’s actually doing: 10x productivity so that we end up with 20x more things to do cos of the sheer possibilities
Bio: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w Substack: https://t.co/dDPEWGiuBW ❤️ 1567 🔁 150

item.title:

Very bullish on SaaS adapting to AI, their stock is getting crushed rn, ...
item.description:
I just bought $5k of Figma
Very bullish on SaaS adapting to AI, their stock is getting crushed rn, and @zoink isn’t gonna miss
Bio: ceo @every | the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI ❤️ 218 🔁 4
